name: Mr. A & Mr. M: The Story of A&M Records
original_name: Mr. A & Mr. M: The Story of A&M Records
overview: An in-depth look at A&M Records, a record label that helped foster the careers of some of the most well-known artists in the music industry. Started by Herb Alpert and Jerry Moss out of a garage in 1962, they built A&M Records into one of the most successful independent record labels in history.
